calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Continued To Jun-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary White for David Styles (Petitioner). Christine Witt (Director of Donor Services) for Humboldt Area Foundation.

The Court stated that its concern is the restrictions on the gift, that the way it is set up has given specific direction as to what is to happen to the funds (70/30 split), that distribution to the Charities is not restricted in that fashion and that it is not sure the Court can order that distribution be done in a certain way. The Court also stated that it could grant instruction to distribute to Humboldt Area Foundation. Ms. White stated she could come back with a revised order but that she would like to present it to the Attorney General ("AG") and to her Client, that the AG asked why this charity, can this charity handle a gift of this size and is it going to be spent all at once. The Court asked if the Trustee could enter into an agreement with the charity. Ms. Witt spoke of the charity and provided history. The Petition for Instructions was continued to June 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
